settings.heading: Kevin® in the press.
settings.lede: Media coverage and interviews about Mitipi, Kevin®, and prevention-first home security. For press kits and spokesperson requests, contact us below.
settings.cta_subheading: Product photos, fact sheet, and spokesperson availability on request.

settings.heading: What they are saying about Kevin®.
settings.body: Selected quotes from international media and product reviews.

settings.quote: The home security industry has a trust problem: most solutions rely on surveillance, forcing people to give up privacy in order to feel protected.
settings.source: Safety Detectives — interview with Dr. Patrick Cotting, CEO, Mitipi AG

settings.quote: This speaker with light and sound effects is supposed to scare off burglars, just like in the original Home Alone films. Kevin.3 is a step forward.
Mitipi Ltd. announces the global launch of KEVIN®.3, the newest version of its home invasion deterrent device—improved simulation based on artificial intelligence and lower energy consumption.
Basée à Fribourg, la société Mitipi collabore avec le Swiss AI Center pour doter Kevin de fonctionnalités IA capables de s'adapter aux habitudes des utilisateurs.
settings.source: Le Temps — Mitipi & Swiss AI Center

settings.quote: Who doesn't know the classic 90s movie 'Home Alone'? An absolutely fitting name for KEVIN®, the smart security companion by Mitipi.

settings.heading: Award-winning innovation worldwide.
settings.body: Kevin has been recognized for design, functionality, and burglary prevention innovation across Europe and the US.

settings.contact_3_value: Product photos & fact sheet on request
